loop.observation: Store distribution channel shards and review constraints were executable through storecontract but remained counted as packaging loop debt.
loop.hypothesis: The root store distribution contract can own the packaging evidence loop while channel shard manifests delegate to it.
loop.execute: Run storecontract against the root contract, verify channel shard files, required docs, notice terms, policy-table output, forbidden provider bundling, and public CI artifact upload.
loop.evaluate: The verifier fails when channel files, review surfaces, notice terms, policy table output, package roots, or workflow evidence drift from the contract.
loop.retrospective: Packaging store knowledge stays in executable contract data while reader docs and policy tables remain generated evidence.

required_notice_terms: No source code from any third-party project is directly incorporated
do not redistribute any vendor code or bundle provider CLI executables
